global_need_reason: The query involves determining if a chair is between two desks and located in the middle of the room. These require assessing relationships across multiple objects and room-level positioning, which cannot be reliably determined from local dynamic canvases alone. A global view is needed to verify the full layout and confirm the chair's central location relative to multiple desks.
